title: Smoked Duck Breast with Roasted French Vegetables
description: A rich and savory dish featuring smoky duck breast paired with roasted French vegetables.
instructions: Rinse the duck breast and pat it dry with paper towels.
Season the duck breast with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat and sear the duck breast for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the duck breast to the oven and roast for 15-20 minutes or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the duck is cooking, toss the carrots, Brussels sprouts, and red bell pepper with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the vegetables in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until they are tender and lightly browned.
Let the duck breast rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Serve the smoked duck breast with the roasted French vegetables and garnish with fresh thyme.
